title: aizoon fruticosum
intro: Aizoon fruticosum, also known as the shrubby aizoon or dwarf carpetweed, is a low-growing, succulent plant native to Africa and the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aizoon fruticosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
